description: Aliyun token-plan quota exhausted. qwen3.7-plus + qwen3.7-max return HTTP 429 (insufficient_quota) for every prompt. Live probe GREEN for MiniMax-M3, RED for Aliyun. Operator action: top up Aliyun token-plan via Aliyun console or wait for billing-cycle reset. Closes when qwen3.7-* returns HTTP 200 again. Verified 2026-07-18T23:25+10:00 via v18692-1 pilot live LLM E2E.

GitLab CI Runner does not yet inject RUN_LIVE_LLM_E2E=1 + API key env vars for the helixon-platform pipeline. Operator action: add CI variables (RUN_LIVE_LLM_E2E=1, MINIMAX_API_KEY=<secret>, ALIYUN_QWEN_TOKEN_PLAN_KEY=<secret>) to the project's masked variables and wire the live E2E job into .gitlab-ci.yml. WSL2 GitLab Runner provisioning is a v18693+ deliverable.

Grafana p99 latency panel over pilot-live-llm.ndjson trend stream not yet built. Trend stream writes one NDJSON row per live probe; p99 aggregation across runs is a v18694-1 workspace doctor v4 candidate. Unblocks when fleet-doctor pipeline picks up the trend file.
